_readme: Vulnerabilities documented + risk-accepted. See docs/SUPPLY_CHAIN_POLICY.md for waiver process. Each entry MUST have: reason, reviewedBy, reviewedAt (ISO date), expires (ISO date, max 90 days out).

@firefly-exchange/library-sui.reason: Bundled with BluefinService for order signing. Server-only. Same risk profile as parent SDK.

@mysten/sui.reason: Core SUI SDK — no upstream fix path exists for the listed CVEs at 1.x. Server-only; we control all inputs. Track upstream at https://github.com/MystenLabs/ts-sdks

@mysten/dapp-kit.reason: Frontend-only; no server exposure. Same version constraint as @mysten/sui.

@mysten/zklogin.reason: Used only in optional zkLogin flow (unused by community pool). If we activate zkLogin at scale, re-review.

@mysten/zksend.reason: Transitive; not directly invoked. Track upstream fix.

@modelcontextprotocol/sdk.reason: Anthropic MCP SDK — ReDoS in the pattern parser. We do not accept untrusted MCP input at runtime.
